Event: Alchemical Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 05/03/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AR235
Immortality Seeker Gear

Once in a while, the unit gains a shield that absorbs 50% damage. The shield lasts for 4 sec. Also during this time, every second the armor wearer removes 2 random debuffs, restores 80000 health and increases their damage, fortitude, physical and magic armor by 15% for 4 sec. Stack up to 5 times. Also, if the armor's wearer dies within 4 sec after the shield is applied, they are resurrected with 25% health.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌚🌚
